title: Customs seizes cars illegally imported to Sri Lanka, under the guise of importing spare parts
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); Sri Lanka Customs on Thursday (23) seized 5 motor cars that were imported from the UK to Sri Lanka.
These cars were imported under the guise of importing motor spare parts, said Sri Lanka Customs.
The vehicles were seized from a storage facility in Orugodawatte, Colombo.
